content.query:
---------------
-----------COPY INTO
----------------------------
--We are creating one table in dedicated sql pool and copying our parquet file from data lake storage account to that created table

CREATE TABLE copy_into_table(
   Dealer_ID VARCHAR(4000),
	Model_ID VARCHAR(4000),
	Branch_ID VARCHAR(4000),
	Date_ID VARCHAR(4000),
	Units_Sold BIGINT,
	Revenue BIGINT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN
);


--LOADING DATA
---------------------------

COPY INTO copy_into_table
(
	Dealer_ID 1,
	Model_ID 2,
	Branch_ID 3,
	Date_ID 4,
	Units_Sold 5,
	Revenue 6
)
FROM 'https://synapseprivatedl.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/revenue_cetas/697ED7B9-64FD-4C3E-A0A5-33C827F9124B_11_0-1.parquet'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE= 'PARQUET',
	CREDENTIAL = (IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity')
)

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM copy_into_table;
